case_title: DEMAREST, RALPH et al vs. KIRKMAN, JAMES DBA A HAIR CONCERN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRKMAN, JAMES DBA A HAIR CONCERN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 745 POLK ST, STAYED UNTIL MAR-24-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, ADDITIONAL TERMS- SEE FULL TEXT OF JUDGMENT ON FILE.
